literal-translation: In beginning created God heavens and earth.
And the earth was formless and empty and darkness upon faces of abyss and Spirit of God hovering upon faces of the waters.
And said God let be light and was light.
And saw God the light that good and separated God between the light and between the darkness.
And called God to light Day and to darkness called Night and was evening and was morning day one.
And said God let be expanse in middle of the waters and let be dividing between waters to waters.
And made God the expanse and separated between the waters which beneath to expanse and between the waters which above to expanse and was so.
And called God to expanse Heavens and was evening and was morning day second.
And said God let be gathered the waters beneath the heavens to place one and let appear the dry-land and was so.
And called God to dry-land Earth and to gathering of the waters called Seas and saw God that good.
And said God let sprout the earth grass herb seeding seed tree fruit making fruit to kind of it which seed of it in it upon the earth and was so.
And brought forth the earth grass herb seeding seed to kind of it and tree making fruit which seed of it in it to kind of it and saw God that good.
And was evening and was morning day third.
And said God let be luminaries in expanse of the heavens to separate between the day and between the night and let be to signs and to seasons and to days and years.
And let be to luminaries in expanse of the heavens to give light upon the earth and was so.
And made God two of the luminaries the great the luminary the great to rule of the day and the luminary the small to rule of the night and the stars.
And set them God in expanse of the heavens to give light upon the earth.
And to rule in day and in night and to separate between the light and between the darkness and saw God that good.
And was evening and was morning day fourth.
And said God let swarm the waters swarm soul living and fowl let fly upon the earth upon faces of expanse of the heavens.
